arts.ttl: Barca dig deep against Leganes with the La Liga crown top of mind
arts.sum: This was an impressive win for Barcelona, after traveling to Leganes on just two days of rest, against a brave team that loves to attack, and who were desperate for points to rescue themselves from the relegation zone. The Dortmund second leg would be a secondary consideration given the four-goal advantage his team was able to build.

arts.ttl: Revealed: What Barca players were told in pre-match huddle
arts.sum: Barcelona enjoyed a motivational pre-match huddle ahead of Saturday’s win over Leganes at Butarque in La Liga . Television cameras picked up the speech, delivered by one of Hansi Flick’s assistant Pepe Conde (the fitness coach), where the players were stressed the importance of the game.

arts.ttl: ‘These are the games where La Liga is won’ - Eric hails ‘fired up’ Barca
arts.sum: Eric Garcia hailed the importance of Barcelona’s win over Leganes after Hansi Flick’s side won 1-0 at Butarque in La Liga on Saturday. The versatile star was back in the starting XI as the Catalans picked up a crucial win that sends Flick’s men seven points clear at the top of the table.

arts.ttl: Barca worried injured Balde will miss Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly worried left-back Alejandro Balde’s will miss the Copa del Rey final after the defender was forced off in the first half against Leganes on Saturday night . The left-back looked really frustrated after going off, and the club are now said to be worried he will miss 2-3 weeks which would rule him out of the Copa del Rey final, according to Sport.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star claims teammate was ‘spectacular’ in win over Leganés

arts.ttl: Greenwood’s Marseille form has BIG transfer implications for Man Utd as Barcelona watch on
arts.sum: Greenwood’s display was described thus: “As gifted as he can be – when he wants to be, and that’s increasingly rare – the former Man Utd player exasperates with his lack of seriousness. Greenwood’s Marseille form has HUGE transfer implications for Man Utd as Barcelona watch on

arts.ttl: Flick reveals why he resisted the urge to rotate vs Leganes
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick revealed why he’s gone with a strong starting XI against Leganes in La Liga and resisted the urge to rotate his team. I’ve spoken to the players and they’re at their best, which is what’s important for us, which is why we’ve only decided to make two substitutions.
